message:
docs(plan): Add Section 30 - Performance Profiling Patterns

CASS mining bead meta_skill-z2r complete.

Section 30 covers:
- Performance analysis methodology (hot path, inefficiency patterns)
- Algorithm/data structure opportunities (tries, bloom filters, heaps)
- SIMD/vectorization patterns (SoA layout, dot product, F16)
- Criterion benchmark patterns (batched, grouped, scaling)
- Profiling build configuration (--profile profiling)
- I/O optimization (mmap, streaming JSON)
- Cache design (LRU with TTL, FxHash)
- Parallel processing (rayon, chunking)
- Real benchmark results reference (30-50x for parallelization)

Plan version: 1.5.0 → 1.6.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
